description:
## Component: hx-copy-button (NEW)
**Tier 2 — Standard Enterprise | Industry Consensus: 3/6 libraries**

Copies specified text to clipboard with visual confirmation feedback.

### ADR-001 Classification: Property-Driven (Atomic)

### API Design
**Properties:** `value` (text to copy), `label` (accessible label), `feedback-duration` (ms, default 2000), `hx-size`
**Slots:** Default (button label), `success-icon`, `copy-icon`
**CSS Parts:** `button`, `icon`
**Events:** `hx-copy` (composed: true, detail: { value })

### Drupal Integration
```twig
{# Copy MRN to clipboard #}
<hx-copy-button value="{{ patient.field_mrn.value }}" label="Copy MRN">
  {{ patient.field_mrn.value }}
</hx-copy-button>
```

### Healthcare: Copy MRN, prescription IDs, appointment codes, reference numbers

### Acceptance Criteria
1. Copies value to clipboard via navigator.clipboard API
2. Visual feedback (icon change + optional text) for configurable duration
3. Fallback for older browsers (execCommand)
4. Accessible: announces "Copied" to screen readers
title: T2-30: hx-copy-button — Clipboard Copy Action

lastReviewFeedback:
coderabbitai: **Actionable comments posted: 9**
🤖 Prompt for all review comments with AI agents ``` Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed. Inline comments: In `@packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-copy-button/hx-copy-button.stories.ts`: - Around line 28-43: iconSuccess is declared but never used causing a lint failure; either remove the unused constant or wire it into the story that needs a success icon (e.g., pass iconSuccess into the story's template or props for the hx-copy-button story). Locate the iconSuccess constant in hx-copy-button.stories (the SVG variable) and either delete the declaration or reference it where other icons are used (match the pattern used by existing icon variables in this file) so the identifier is consumed. - Around line 113-123: The story's render function for hx-copy-button is injecting iconCopy unslotted so it appears in the default slot as well as the named copy-icon slot; update the render template in the hx-copy-button story to either remove the bare ${iconCopy} or place it with a slot attribute (e.g., ${iconCopy}) so the icon only renders into the named "copy-icon" slot for the hx-copy-button component. - Around line 568-570: Replace hardcoded inline style attributes on the story

elements (e.g., the style="margin-top: 0.75rem; font-size: 0.875rem; color: `#6b7280`;" instances in hx-copy-button.stories.ts and the other occurrences at the ranges noted) with the design-token CSS custom properties (use the --hx-* tokens for spacing, typography and color). Locate the inline style strings in the story templates and change margin-top, font-size and color to use the appropriate tokens (for example --hx-spacing-*, --hx-font-size-*, --hx-color-*) so all spacing, type and color values come from the theme tokens instead of hardcoded rem/hex values. Ensure every listed occurrence (lines around 591-593, 636-637, 650-652, 685, 687-688, 721, 757
